name: net_connection_win_wscript_cscript_local_connection
raw_query: any where network.direction:"true" and (process.executable like~ ("*\\wscript.exe", "*\\cscript.exe")) and (cidrMatch(destination.ip, "127.0.0.0/8") or cidrMatch(destination.ip, "10.0.0.0/8") or cidrMatch(destination.ip, "172.16.0.0/12") or cidrMatch(destination.ip, "192.168.0.0/16") or cidrMatch(destination.ip, "169.254.0.0/16") or cidrMatch(destination.ip, "::1/128") or cidrMatch(destination.ip, "fe80::/10") or cidrMatch(destination.ip, "fc00::/7"))
